payload.answer: The SQL debug/admin query cannot be executed because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No results from memory_cards are available in this context.
citations: Input specifies: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: No memory entity mentioned; this is a request for operational context about an admin SQL command.

details: Admin SQL execution is disabled by configuration.
No memory state was changed or committed.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED and rerun the admin SQL command.
Use supported non-SQL Brain inspection/debug commands if available.
Query memory through the standard memory retrieval interface instead of admin SQL.
